summary: Tested Customer Segmentation feature including backend APIs and frontend UI. Backend: 19/19 tests passed. Frontend: All UI components verified. Segment page displays correctly with customer data, campaign dialog, and view segment functionality.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/admin/customer-segments requires authentication (401)
Backend: GET /api/admin/customer-segments/{segment} requires authentication (401)
Backend: POST /api/admin/customer-segments/{segment}/campaign requires authentication (401)
Backend: POST /api/admin/customer-segments/{segment}/send-campaign requires authentication (401)
Backend: Regular user cannot access customer segments (403)
Backend: GET /api/admin/customer-segments returns segments array with summary
Backend: Segments have required fields (segment, label, description, color, customer_count, total_revenue, customers)
Backend: Segment types are valid (vip, loyal, at_risk, new, dormant)
Backend: GET /api/admin/customer-segments/new returns detailed segment info
Backend: GET /api/admin/customer-segments/vip returns VIP segment info
Backend: Invalid segment returns 400
Backend: POST /api/admin/customer-segments/new/campaign generates 'WELCOME10' template
Backend: POST /api/admin/customer-segments/vip/campaign generates 'VIP20' template
Backend: POST /api/admin/customer-segments/at_risk/campaign generates 'COMEBACK25' template
Backend: POST /api/admin/customer-segments/loyal/campaign generates 'LOYAL15' template
Backend: POST /api/admin/customer-segments/dormant/campaign generates 'WINBACK30' template
Backend: Invalid segment returns 400 for campaign generation
Backend: POST /api/admin/customer-segments/new/send-campaign works (MOCKED)
Backend: Invalid segment returns 400 for send campaign
Frontend: Admin Dashboard has Segments button with data-testid='segments-btn'
Frontend: Segments page loads at /admin/segments
Frontend: Page title 'Customer Segments' displayed
Frontend: Subtitle 'AI-powered customer segmentation for targeted campaigns' displayed
Frontend: Auto-Updated badge displayed
Frontend: Summary stats - Total Customers, Total Revenue, Active Segments displayed
Frontend: New Customers segment card displayed with customer count and revenue
Frontend: Segment card shows 'Recent customers' preview with avatars
Frontend: View button opens segment detail dialog showing customer list
Frontend: Campaign button opens campaign dialog with pre-filled fields
Frontend: Campaign dialog shows subject, message, discount, promo code inputs
Frontend: Campaign dialog shows email preview HTML
Frontend: Send Campaign button present in dialog
seed_data_creation: Test users created during testing for non-admin access verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: Customer Segmentation feature fully functional. API endpoints: GET /api/admin/customer-segments (all segments), GET /api/admin/customer-segments/{segment} (detail), POST /api/admin/customer-segments/{segment}/campaign (generate template), POST /api/admin/customer-segments/{segment}/send-campaign (send emails). Segment types: vip (VIP20, 20% off), loyal (LOYAL15, 15% off), at_risk (COMEBACK25, 25% off), new (WELCOME10, 10% off), dormant (WINBACK30, 30% off). Currently all 13 test users are in 'new' segment. Frontend page at /admin/segments shows segment cards with View and Campaign buttons. Admin Dashboard has data-testid='segments-btn' for navigation.

mocked_apis.Resend Email API: MOCKED - RESEND_API_KEY not configured - campaign emails won't actually send

frontend_segments_page.testids: page-title, segments-btn (dashboard), segment-{type}, view-{type}, campaign-{type}, campaign-subject, campaign-message, campaign-discount, campaign-code, send-campaign-btn
frontend_segments_page.summary_stats: Total Customers, Total Revenue, Active Segments displayed
frontend_segments_page.segment_card_features: Customer count badge, Total Revenue, Recent customers avatars, View button, Campaign button
frontend_segments_page.campaign_dialog_features: Pre-filled subject, message, discount, promo_code, email preview HTML, Send button
